headline: 3 AI Data Center Power Stocks to Buy in July
summary: Hyperscaler AI capital spending has been raised to $750 billion in 2026, up from $670 billion, and is set to cross $1 trillion in 2027. That capital buys far more than GPUs: the switchgear, transformers, gas turbines, and prime-power gensets that turn electrons into trained models. The Department of Energy already projects data centers will ... 3 AI Data Center Power Stocks to Buy in July
